text_block_list.name: Mejiro McQueen
text_block_list.text:
I apologize, everyone. That was certainly not the performance I 
wanted to give.

text_block_list.name: Gold Ship
text_block_list.text:
Hey now, why the heck are you apologizin'? You're making it sound 
like you've crimed us or somethin'.

text_block_list.name: Gold Ship
text_block_list.text:
And the Japan Cup is just a bonkers race, yeah? Finishin' fourth with 
all the other stars out there is pretty dang respectable.

text_block_list.name: Horsegirl with Straight-cut Bangs
text_block_list.text:
She's right! I was just as enraptured with your running today as I have 
ever been!

text_block_list.name: Gold Ship
text_block_list.text:
Plus, no crazy incidents happened today. Our trainer here's definitely 
gonna treat ya to somethin' nice, right?
Huh? Oh, yeah! That's right! Let's go stuff our faces, McQueen!
Huh? Oh, yeah! That's right! Let's go stuff our faces, McQueen!

text_block_list.name: Mejiro McQueen
text_block_list.text: I… must politely decline.

text_block_list.name: Mejiro McQueen
text_block_list.text:
I have the Arima Kinen to prepare for, and I'm not even hungry, 
having just finished a race.

text_block_list.name: Mejiro McQueen
text_block_list.text:
Ah, and I must make a call to Grandmother. Please go ahead without 
me.

text_block_list.name: Mejiro McQueen
text_block_list.text: Everyone… I am so, so sorry.

text_block_list.name: Gold Ship
text_block_list.text:
Guess that wasn't very convincing… You too, though. You suck at 
acting!
Sorry. It took me a second to catch on, but I tried…
Sorry. It took me a second to catch on, but I tried…

When McQueen fled the room, I wasn't sure whether to go after her 
or give her some space — a moment of indecision I'm already 
regretting.

text_block_list.name: Oguri Cap
text_block_list.text: Excuse me.

text_block_list.name: Gold Ship
text_block_list.text: Hey, if it isn't Oguri! Didja come out to cheer for McQueen?

text_block_list.name: Oguri Cap
text_block_list.text:
Of course. I owe this team a lot, and I heard its brightest star would 
be running.

text_block_list.name: Oguri Cap
text_block_list.text: But where is that star, might I ask?

text_block_list.name: Oguri Cap
text_block_list.text: Hm… It seems something happened here. Will you tell me about it?

I tell Oguri Cap everything that transpired since she departed from 
the team.

I tell Oguri Cap everything that transpired since she departed from 
the team.

About how we were in danger of being disbanded, and how we were 
able to overcome that by recruiting new members.

About the embarrassment McQueen had suffered at the autumn 
Tenno Sho, and her attempt to redeem herself today — only to place 
fourth.

I explain how everything keeps failing to come together for Mejiro 
McQueen, no matter how she tries to make the pieces fit.

text_block_list.name: Oguri Cap
text_block_list.text: I see. I can sympathize with her quite a bit.

text_block_list.name: Oguri Cap
text_block_list.text:
She's convinced herself that she has to live up to every expectation 
of her.
You think so?

text_block_list.name: Oguri Cap
text_block_list.text: I went through the same thing.

text_block_list.name: Oguri Cap
text_block_list.text:
Good results breed expectations, and before you know it, you've 
bound yourself to meet those expectations.

text_block_list.name: Oguri Cap
text_block_list.text: Soon, they all start to feel like obstacles in your path.
Obstacles… I see.

The only reason this team is still around is because Mejiro McQueen 
was there for us.
Everyone looks up to her… aspires to be like her.

And it's not just the other runners. I piled on the pressure with every 
victory, too.

And it's not just the other runners. I piled on the pressure with every 
victory, too.

It's obvious now that she has been struggling with everything riding 
on her shoulders.

text_block_list.name: Oguri Cap
text_block_list.text:
As a trainer, perhaps you could find a way to turn those obstacles into 
a source of power.
From obstacles to power…
Oguri, how did the old man go about helping you do that?
Oguri, how did the old man go about helping you do that?

text_block_list.name: Oguri Cap
text_block_list.text: Hm, I suppose I could tell you…

text_block_list.name: Oguri Cap
text_block_list.text:
But it's just what worked for us. You and McQueen have your own 
special bond.

text_block_list.name: Oguri Cap
text_block_list.text: I think you'd best approach it in a way that works for you.
The bond that McQueen and I share…
The bond that McQueen and I share…

I have none of the skill or charisma that my mentor possessed, yet 
McQueen still trusted me to be her trainer.

I have none of the skill or charisma that my mentor possessed, yet 
McQueen still trusted me to be her trainer.

Just why did she choose to place her faith in me? What can I do now 
in her hour of need?

Just why did she choose to place her faith in me? What can I do now 
in her hour of need?

text_block_list.name: Mejiro McQueen
text_block_list.text:
Hehe, no hesitation at all. That part of you hasn't changed at all from 
your assistant trainer days.

text_block_list.name: Mejiro McQueen
text_block_list.text: Always putting us first…

That's it. That's what I need to do. I need to stand by her side, and 
offer her my faith and support.
choice_data_list: I'm going to go look for McQueen.

text_block_list.text:
That's it. That's what I need to do. I need to stand by her side, and 
offer her my faith and support.
choice_data_list: I'm going to go look for McQueen.
I'm going to go look for McQueen.

text_block_list.name: Gold Ship
text_block_list.text:
Mmkay. Well, I guess I'll go loiter around the academy road and near 
the station.

text_block_list.name: Horsegirl with Straight-cut Bangs
text_block_list.text: I'll go see if she went back to the academy!

text_block_list.name: Droopy-eyed Horsegirl
text_block_list.text: And I'll go looking around the racecourse!

text_block_list.name: Horsegirl with Black Bob-cut
text_block_list.text: Maybe she went to the shrine? I'll drop by and check!
choice_data_list: Thank you, all of you. Let's go!
Thank you, all of you. Let's go!

text_block_list.text: Our team's ace needs us now more than ever!
Our team's ace needs us now more than ever!
